mapper.select: /* 사용자 한건 조회 */ select user_idx, user_id, user_pw, user_type, main_user_idx, main_user_yn, auth_type, lang_type, comp_idx, co_name, co_tel, co_email, psn_name, psn_dept, psn_tel, psn_mobile, psn_email, note, site_grp_idx, site_id, del_yn, reg_uid, reg_date, mod_uid, mod_date from tb_user where user_idx = #{userIdx }

/* 마지막에 추가된 사용자 한건 조회 */ select user_idx, user_id, user_pw, user_type, main_user_idx, main_user_yn, auth_type, lang_type, comp_idx, co_name, co_tel, co_email, psn_name, psn_dept, psn_tel, psn_mobile, psn_email, note, site_grp_idx, site_id, del_yn, reg_uid, reg_date, mod_uid, mod_date from tb_user where user_id = #{userId } order by user_idx desc limit 1

/* 사용자 id 존재여부 확인 */ select user_idx, user_id, user_pw, user_type, main_user_idx, main_user_yn, auth_type, lang_type, comp_idx, co_name, co_tel, co_email, psn_name, psn_dept, psn_tel, psn_mobile, psn_email, note, site_grp_idx, site_id, del_yn, reg_uid, reg_date, mod_uid, mod_date from tb_user where user_id = #{userId }
mapper.insert: /* 사용자 등록 */ insert into tb_user ( user_id, /* 아이디 */ user_pw, /* 패스워드 */ user_type, /* 사용자구분(1:동서발전,2:고객사) */ main_user_idx, /* 주사용자식별자 */ main_user_yn, /* 주사용자여부(Y:예,N:아니오) */ auth_type, /* 권한구분(1:포털관리자,2:고객사관리자,3:그룹관리자,4:사이트관리자,5:사이트이용자) */ lang_type, /* 언어구분(1:한국어,2:영어,3:일본어) */ comp_idx, /* 회사식별자 */ co_name, /* 고객사명 */ co_tel, /* 회사전화번호 */ co_email, /* 회사이메일주소 */ psn_name, /* 담당자명 */ psn_dept, /* 담당자부서 */ psn_tel, /* 담당자전화번호 */ psn_mobile, /* 담당자휴대폰번호 */ psn_email, /* 담당자이메일주소 */ note, /* 비고 */ site_grp_idx, /* 사이트그룹식별자 */ site_id, /* 사이트ID */ del_yn, reg_uid, reg_date ) values ( #{userId }, sha2(#{userPw }, 256), #{userType }, #{mainUserIdx }, #{mainUserYn }, #{authType }, #{langType }, #{compIdx }, #{coName }, #{coTel }, #{coEmail }, #{psnName }, #{psnDept }, #{psnTel }, #{psnMobile }, #{psnEmail }, #{note }, #{siteGrpIdx }, #{siteId }, 'N', #{regUid }, now() )
mapper.update:
/* 사용자 수정 */ update tb_user set
user_pw = sha2(#{userPw }, 256), /* 패스워드 */
user_type = #{userType }, /* 사용자구분(1:동서발전,2:고객사) */
main_user_idx = #{mainUserIdx }, /* 주사용자식별자 */
main_user_yn = #{mainUserYn }, /* 주사용자여부(Y:예,N:아니오) */
auth_type = #{authType }, /* 권한구분(1:포털관리자,2:고객사관리자,3:그룹관리자,4:사이트관리자,5:사이트이용자) */
lang_type = #{langType }, /* 언어구분(1:한국어,2:영어,3:일본어) */
comp_idx = #{compIdx }, /* 회사식별자 */
co_name = #{coName }, /* 고객사명 */
co_tel = #{coTel }, /* 회사전화번호 */
co_email = #{coEmail }, /* 회사이메일주소 */
psn_name = #{psnName }, /* 담당자명 */
psn_dept = #{psnDept }, /* 담당자부서 */
psn_tel = #{psnTel }, /* 담당자전화번호 */
psn_mobile = #{psnMobile }, /* 담당자휴대폰번호 */
psn_email = #{psnEmail }, /* 담당자이메일주소 */
note = #{note }, /* 비고 */
site_grp_idx = #{siteGrpIdx }, /* 사이트그룹식별자 */
site_id = #{siteId }, /* 사이트ID */
mod_uid = #{modUid }, mod_date = now() where user_idx = #{userIdx }
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_common_code ( code_id, up_code_id, code_name, use_yn, reg_uid, reg_date ) SELECT #{code_id}, #{up_code_id}, #{code_name}, 'Y', #{regUid}, now() from dual WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM tb_common_code WHERE code_id = #{code_id} AND up_code_id= #{up_code_id} )

insert into tb_image ( img_type, img_path, img_origin_name, img_save_name, img_desc, reg_uid, reg_date ) values
( 1, #{item.img_path}, #{item.img_origin_name}, #{item.img_save_name}, #{item.img_desc}, #{item.regUid}, now())
mapper.update: update tb_common_code set code_id = #{code_id}, code_name = #{code_name}, mod_uid = #{modUid}, mod_date = now() where (code_id, up_code_id) = (#{ex_code_id}, #{up_code_id}) and NOT exists(select * from tb_common_code where code_id = #{code_id} and up_code_id = #{up_code_id} );

update tb_image set img_type = '1', img_path = #{img_path}, img_origin_name = #{img_origin_name}, img_save_name = #{img_save_name}, img_desc = #{img_desc}, mod_uid = #{modUid}, mod_date = now() where img_idx = #{img_idx}
mapper.delete:
delete from tb_common_code where (code_id, up_code_id) in
(#{item.code_id}, #{item.up_code_id})

delete from tb_image where img_type = '1' and img_idx in
#{item.img_idx}
mapper.update: update tb_common_code set code_id = #{code_id}, code_name = #{code_name}, code_desc = #{code_desc}, mod_uid = #{modUid}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, mod_uid = #{modUid}, mod_date = now() where (code_id, up_code_id) = (#{ex_code_id}, #{up_code_id})
update tb_image set img_origin_name = #{img_origin_name}, mod_uid = #{modUid}, mod_date = now() where img_idx = #{img_idx}
